privileged_info_summary: The task deploys a Python Flask API service (using Flask 3.0.3, Gunicorn 21.2.0, Python 3.11-slim base image) to a local Docker registry running registry:2 on port 5000. The application is located at /home/ga/api-service. The task requires building the image with two tags: localhost:5000/api-service:v1.0.0 and localhost:5000/api-service:latest. A docker-compose.yml must be created that pulls the registry image (not using build:) and exposes the API on port 7080. All metadata values (app_dir, registry_port, image_name, version_tag, app_port, expected_registry_url) are verified and correct. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup script.
